item.title: Ft. Sensor dust ÔťĘ itÔÇÖs a long unfortunate story. Anyways I c...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Ft. Sensor dust ÔťĘ itÔÇÖs a long unfortunate story. Anyways I could eat the entire dish, this was a 10/10 Ingredients: -18-20 jumbo shells -15oz ricotta cheese -2/3c grated parm -2/3c grated low moisture mozzarella -1 egg -1tbsp chopped basil, 1tsp dried oregano, chili flakes -salt, pepper -saut├ęed veggies: 2 diced squashes (I did zucchini and yellow, 1/2 white onion, kernels from 1 ear of corn, 3 minced garlic cloves) -25oz marinara sauce (I used summer lemon flavor! Highly recommend with this) -get a fun summer wine to pair with! I had a delish skin contact one :) Recipe: -on med heat add 1tbsp oil, onions, and salt. Saut├ę until softened, add zucchini, corn and garlic and cook until slightly golden (5-10ish min) stir occasionally. Set aside and let cool slightly -cook jumbo noodles according to package (~14 min). DonÔÇÖt undercook them, it doesnÔÇÖt cook much in the sauce. Toss in oil after so they donÔÇÖt stick together when assembling. -in a bowl mix together ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, basil, oregano, chili flakes, and salt and pepper. Fold in saut├ęed veggies **I eyeballed this but the measurements above should get you to a good spot lmaoo you canÔÇÖt really mess this up, if its too ÔÇťliquidyÔÇŁ add more shredded cheese -preheat oven to 425F -pour sauce into a 9x16 dish, fill shells with about 2tbsp of the mixture and layer in the sauce. Cover in extra shredded cheese and foil. -Bake for 15 min, remove foil and bake for another 10 min until sauce and cheese is bubbling! -top with parm, lemon zest and basil ­čî╝
@SAUZ

item.title:
Elote will be my go-to way to elevate corn this summer! ┬á
┬...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Elote will be my go-to way to elevate corn this summer! ┬á ┬áPrep, Cook and recrisped all in the Ninja Crispi┬áRecipe below! Ingredients: -2-4 ears of corn┬á -avocado oil -sauce: equal parts mayo and mexican crema (or sub sour cream), lime juice, grated garlic, salt (taste and adjust to your liking) -cotija cheese -paprika and ancho chili powder┬á -cilantro┬á Recipe:┬á -cover the corn in oil and salt. add to Ninja Crispi and airfry for 12-15 min, flip halfway. ****Conveniently chicken thighs cook for about the same amount of time, so I threw some in that had been marinating in a bbq mixture.┬á -while it's cooking, mix together sauce ingredients -once the corn has cooled slightly, brush on the sauce and cover in cotija cheese. sprinkle paprika and ancho chili powder, add cilantro!┬á -enjoy immediately, and thank me later!! :)┬á **store sauce, cotija cheese, and corn separately. When ready to eat the leftovers use the re-crisp option on the Ninja Crispi for 5-8 minutes. assemble elote and enjoy (again hehe)┬á
@Ninja Kitchen #NinjaPartner #NinjaCrispi

item.title: SURF & SNACK DAY!! Ingredients listed below :) I think this ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


SURF & SNACK DAY!! Ingredients listed below :) I think this is my 5th day trying to surf and I might have a new hobby ­čĹÇ Wrap: tortilla, chipotle mayo, sliced smoked turkey, spinach, havarti cheese ÔÇö roll and slice Veggie sandwich: avocado w/ salt and pepper, whipped cream cheese, cucumber, sliced pepperoncinis, sprouts Ham & cheese: Dijon, butter, ham, cheddar cheese, turkey Caprese: tomato with salt, basil, mozzarella, prosciutto, balsamic glaze **I cut off the bread crust and sliced them all in half! Fruit salad: pineapple, mango, watermelon, strawberries, and lime (RIP my mini tajin bottle, you wouldÔÇÖve made this perfect and adorableÔÇŽ next time :ÔÇÖ))

item.title:
My go-to dinner recently! Recipe┬ábelow!!
┬á Ingredients:┬á -...
item.description:
View on TikTok


My go-to dinner recently! Recipe┬ábelow!! ┬á Ingredients:┬á -chicken thighs (bone-in, skin-on *if you want) -Chosen Foods Lemon Garlic Dressing & Marinade┬á -veggies of your choice: bell pepper, red onion, yellow┬ásquash, zucchini┬á -tzatziki: grated cucumber, greek yogurt, lemon juice, chopped dill, grated garlic, salt, Chosen Foods avocado oil┬á -quinoa┬á -mixed greens┬á -quartered cherry tomatoes┬á -toppings: fresh mint, feta cheese┬á Recipe:┬á -cover chicken thighs in Lemon Garlic marinade, massage. Let sit for 30 min at room temperature or put in the fridge for 1-12 hours. -preheat the oven to 425F, place chicken on a rack and bake for 35min (or until fully cooked). Broil for the last 2 min to make it extra crispy.┬á -while the chicken is in the oven, chop the veggies. lightly cover in Avocado oil and spices of your choice (I use salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and garlic powder). saute in cast iron over medium-high heat until fully cooked and browned.┬á -cook quinoa according to the directions on the package┬á -tzatziki: grate and strain cucumber, mix together all the ingredients listed above. taste and adjust to your liking!┬á -to assemble the bowl: I like adding mixed greens, quinoa, cooked veggies, tzatziki, tomatoes, baked chicken and toppings. Add Chosen Foods Lemon Garlic Dressing on top┬áfor some extra zest!┬á
@Chosen Foods #ChosenFoodsPartner
